SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_INP_COINS_2M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2013. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance 
percentage will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding co-payment variable 
called (PRE_ICL_INP_COPAY_2M).
